findings.description: The signature block image (containing 'Sincerely,' and 'Judith A. Wehner') is rendered alongside duplicate HTML text of the same content, creating a reading-order disruption with doubled 'Sincerely,' and doubled 'Judith A. Wehner'.
findings.evidence: PDF page 4 shows a single 'Sincerely,' followed by the handwritten signature, then 'Judith A. Wehner' and 'Assistant State Mining Specialist'. The HTML shows typed 'Sincerely,' text, then the signature image (which itself contains 'Sincerely,' and 'Judith A. Wehner'), then again 'Judith A. Wehner' and 'Assistant State Mining Specialist' as separate text elements.
